summary: Completed testing of critical balance toggle fix and visual contrast improvements. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Balance toggle (eye icon) was triggering payment form submissions due to missing type='button' attribute - could cause accidental money transfers! Fix confirmed at code level. Visual improvements in admin panel User Details section verified through UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test balance toggle behavior in transfer form - users redirected to KYC completion
integration_issues.selector: KYC form blocks access to transfer functionality
integration_issues.note: Expected behavior for banking app - KYC required before transfers
